title: Rule
description: A single Workflow Analyzer rule as declared in a package catalog.

id.description: Rule identifier in hyphen form, e.g. CPRIMA-T-001 or F401. This is the value passed to the Rule<T> constructor. Resource keys (localization, display strings) use the underscore form CPRIMA_T_001_Name — that is a derived form and is not stored here.

description.description: One-line description of what the rule checks.

recommendation.description: Actionable guidance shown to the user on violation.

categoryCode.description: Category code, e.g. T. Resolves against the catalog's categories.

scope.description: SDK model type the rule inspects.

type.description: SDK type. Counters have no severity.

defaultSeverity.description: Default error level. Null for Counter (always Info).

defaultIsEnabled.description: Whether the rule is enabled by default in Studio.

requiredFeature.description: DesignFeatureKeys constant required to register this rule, or null.

documentationLink.description: URL to rule documentation, or null.

tags.description: Arbitrary labels for filtering and grouping.

key.description: Parameter key used in code, e.g. 'Prefix'.
